understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to move one or more selectable pieces onto goal tiles marked '+' to win each level, and ultimately complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Clicking a tile selects it if it contains a piece, moving it instantly to the clicked location if the path is clear. Obstacles and walls block movement, preventing pieces from moving through them. Only one piece appears to be active at a time, and the goal requires placing it onto the '+' tile. The step budget limits total actions per level.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to move one or more selectable pieces onto goal tiles marked '+' to win each level, and ultimately complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Clicking a tile selects it if it contains a piece, moving it instantly to the clicked location if the path is clear. Obstacles and walls block movement, preventing pieces from moving through them. Only one piece appears to be active at a time, and the goal requires placing it onto the '+' tile.
